hero_subtitle: Tell us about your land, income, and family in seconds — by typing or speaking. Niti-Setu reads the actual scheme documents and tells you exactly which benefits you qualify for, and why.
lp_feat_title: A Complete Picture, Not Just a Yes or No
lp_feat_desc: Built on verified scheme documents — not guesswork. Every eligibility answer comes with the clause it was drawn from.
lp_feat1_desc: Speak in your language — Whisper AI transcribes and processes your details instantly.
lp_feat2_desc: LLaMA 3.3 reads scheme PDFs and matches your profile against real eligibility clauses.
lp_feat3_desc: Every answer cites the exact scheme section so you know the reasoning — not just the result.
lp_feat4_desc: District-level analytics: scheme adoption trends, demographic breakdowns, history logs.
lp_feat5_desc: JWT auth with strict RBAC. Farmer data stays private — admins see only aggregated insights.
lp_feat6_desc: One-tap Google login — no password set-up needed for farmers accessing for the first time.
lp_aud_title: From the Field to the District Office
lp_aud_desc: Niti-Setu is built for everyone across the agricultural support chain — not just administrators.
lp_aud1_desc: Type or speak your farm details and get a clear list of eligible schemes with exact benefit amounts — in seconds.
lp_aud2_desc: Monitor which schemes are gaining traction, identify underserved populations, and track historical checks.
lp_aud3_desc: Upload new scheme PDFs to instantly expand the knowledge base and stress-test eligibility logic.
lp_aud4_desc: Run bulk eligibility checks on behalf of rural communities to identify overlooked benefit gaps.
lp_tech1_desc: Sub-second LLM inference for reliable eligibility judgment on any farm profile.
lp_tech2_desc: All passwords bcrypt-hashed. Role-based access splits farmer and admin views completely.
lp_tech3_desc: Multilingual speech recognition — farmers can dictate in their regional language.
lp_tech4_desc: No LangChain. Built from scratch: PDF → chunks → embeddings → Atlas vector search.
lp_cta_desc: Register as a farmer to check your eligibility right now, or explore the source code to understand how it works — everything is open.
lp_cta_student: A student project for agricultural equity
lp_footer_desc: Helping Indian farmers discover the welfare schemes they're entitled to — through voice, AI, and open data.

chat_dash_subtitle: Dedicated AI workspace for farming intelligence and app support
chat_dash_placeholder: Ask Krishi Mitra about schemes, weather, or agriculture...
chat_dash_welcome: Welcome to Krishi Mitra Support. I am your specialized AI agricultural assistant. You can ask me about farming techniques, schemes, or how to use this app.
faq_subtitle: Comprehensive guidance on how Niti Setu leverages AI to empower Indian agriculture.
faq_a1: Niti Setu is an enterprise-grade agricultural intelligence platform built to bridge the gap between farmers and welfare schemes. It utilizes an advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline combined with Groq's high-speed inference to instantly evaluate eligibility against verified government documents.
faq_q2: Is the platform free for farmers?
faq_a2: Yes, core eligibility assessments, Krishi Mitra voice assistance, and scheme browsing are entirely free and accessible to the public, ensuring maximum rural reach.
faq_q3: How does Document Auto-Scan process my files?
faq_a3: When you upload a document (like an Aadhaar or 7/12 land record), our Vision AI instantly extracts relevant parameters (name, state, land holding) to auto-fill your profile. Utilizing an ephemeral architecture, the document file exists on our server for strictly `< 500ms` before being permanently deleted.
faq_q4: Are my uploaded documents stored securely?
faq_a4: We do not store them at all. Our system operates on a zero-retention policy for user document scans. Once the necessary text is parsed, the buffer is wiped and the raw file deleted via `fs.unlink`, guaranteeing complete data privacy.
faq_q5: Does the AI support regional dialects?
faq_a5: Yes, Krishi Mitra supports multiple Indian languages and specific regional sub-dialects. You can speak naturally via the microphone, and our integrated Whisper AI model provides localized transcriptions.
faq_q6: How accurate is the eligibility engine?
faq_a6: Extremely accurate. Our eligibility engine uses a highly optimized RAG architecture backed by MongoDB Atlas Vector Search. Every AI determination comes with a strict citation mapping back to the exact page, section, and paragraph of the official government scheme document.
lp_subtitle: Establishing profound trust through absolute transparency, zero-retention architectures, and state-of-the-art cryptographic protection protocols.
lp_audit: Our infrastructure is continuously audited and strictly compliant with modern data protection frameworks. Your data is handled with maximum fidelity.
lp_sec1_desc: Niti Setu strictly adheres to India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023. We enforce purpose limitation and data minimization—collecting only what is mathematically required to compute eligibility determinants.
lp_sec2_desc: Document uploads (like Aadhaar or Land Records) operate through an ephemeral data flow. Source files exist in our temporary disk buffer for less than 500 milliseconds. After programmatic text extraction is verified, binary files are irretrievably purged.
lp_sec3_desc: All transit data is secured via bank-grade TLS 1.3 encryption. At rest, user identifiers and session histories are encrypted within isolated MongoDB clusters adhering to strict RBAC protocols.
lp_sec4_desc: We enforce rigorous pre-processing routines that strip Personally Identifiable Information (PII) before executing prompts against Large Language Models (LLMs). Your identity identity remains mathematically isolated from our inference nodes.
cm_confirm_delete_msg: STRICT WARNING: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to permanently delete this?
chat_clear_msg: STRICT WARNING: This will permanently delete your entire conversation history with Krishi Mitra. This action cannot be undone.
